hero.headline: AI systems that eliminate repetitive operational work.
hero.subheadline: We build custom automation for operations-heavy businesses — reducing manual effort, cutting errors, and letting your team focus on work that actually matters.
hero.trustLabel: Trusted by growing businesses in Europe

credibility.headline: Why Agentic
credibility.intro: We're a small agency with deep roots in software engineering and business operations. We've seen how manual workflows create bottlenecks — and we know how to fix them.

problem.headline: Manual workflows don't scale.
problem.intro: Growing businesses hit a ceiling because many operations are repetitive, error-prone, and still done by hand.

items.title: Data entry that repeats daily
items.description: Orders, reports, and updates entered manually into systems that should talk to each other.

items.title: Processes that break under volume
items.description: What worked at 50 orders a week struggles at 500. Headcount can't keep pace indefinitely.

items.title: Errors that slip through
items.description: Human review catches most things. Not all. And mistakes in operations have real consequences.

items.title: Time spent on the wrong things
items.description: Your team is capable of more. But repetitive admin work fills the day before higher-value work gets a chance.

solution.headline: Automation built around your actual workflow.
solution.intro: We don't sell you a platform. We learn how your operation works and build systems that fit directly into it.

items.title: Understand your workflow first
items.description: We audit your existing processes before writing a single line of code.

items.title: Connect systems that don't talk
items.description: Extract, validate, and route data between tools — without manual handling in the middle.

items.title: Handle unstructured inputs
items.description: Emails, PDFs, images, forms: AI can read and process sources that standard integrations can't.

items.title: Run reliably full visibility
items.description: Automations built to run quietly in the background, with error handling that surfaces the right alerts.

caseStudy.headline: From manual order entry to automated ERP ingestion.
caseStudy.context: Kult Kefir is a Belgium-based fermented lemonade brand with a growing wholesale operation. Customer orders arrived by email — in varying formats, with no standard structure.
beforeItems: Staff manually read each order email
Data hand-entered into the ERP system
Orders handled only during business hours
Human error risk on every order
afterItems: AI agent monitors the orders inbox
Extracts order data from emails and attachments
Validates and structures order data automatically
Pushes orders directly into the ERP

outcomes.label: Reduction in manual order entry time

caseStudy.quote: Orders that used to take an hour now process themselves. The team can focus on fulfilment, not admin.

benefits.headline: What changes when your operations run on automation.

items.title: Less repetitive work
items.description: Tasks your team does the same way every day are candidates for automation. Free that time up.

items.title: Faster turnaround
items.description: Processes that depend on human availability become instant. No queue, no wait.

items.title: Lower operational cost
items.description: Scale volume without scaling headcount. The unit economics improve as you grow.

items.title: Fewer errors
items.description: Consistent, rule-based processing outperforms manual review at scale.

items.title: Scalable infrastructure
items.description: Handle more volume with the same system. Growth stops being a staffing problem.

items.title: Clear visibility
items.description: Automated systems create logs. You know exactly what ran, when, and what it produced.

process.headline: How we work
process.intro: Simple, structured, and focused on getting something real into production quickly.

steps.title: Audit
steps.description: We map your current workflows, identify the biggest repetitive bottlenecks, and determine what's automatable with high confidence.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We propose an automation architecture that fits your stack, your data sources, and your existing tools.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We build, test, and deploy. You're involved at every milestone. Nothing ships without your sign-off.

steps.title: Iterate
steps.description: After launch, we monitor, refine, and extend. Automation improves with real-world data.

founders.headline: Who we are
founders.intro: Two entrepreneurs who've spent years at the intersection of software and operations.

people.name: Adrien van den Branden
people.bio: Entrepreneur with a background in building production systems for operational-scale companies. Focused on making automation reliable and maintainable.

people.name: James de Wasseige
people.bio: Entrepreneur with deep experience in AI systems and workflow design. Focused on translating business processes into reliable, scalable automations.

items.question: Do we need technical knowledge to work with you?
items.answer: No. We handle the technical side entirely. You explain how your operation works; we figure out how to automate it. The only thing we need from you is access to your workflow and a few hours of your team's time upfront.

items.question: Can this work with our existing tools?
items.answer: Most of the time, yes. We integrate with ERPs, CRMs, email systems, spreadsheets, and internal databases. If you're using a tool with an API or webhook support, there's a good chance we can connect to it.

items.question: How long does implementation take?
items.answer: Most projects go from audit to production in two to four weeks. More complex systems with multiple integrations take longer. We'll give you a clear timeline at the end of the audit phase.

items.question: How reliable are AI automations?
items.answer: Reliable enough to run in production — with appropriate guardrails. We build in validation steps, error handling, and human review queues for edge cases. The goal is a system your team can trust, not one that needs constant monitoring.

items.question: How do you handle privacy and security?
items.answer: We treat data handling seriously. Automations process only what's necessary, credentials are stored securely, and we follow appropriate practices for the sensitivity of your data. We'll discuss specifics before any work begins.

items.question: Can AI process unstructured inputs like emails or PDFs?
items.answer: Yes — that's where AI adds the most value. Modern language models can extract structured data from emails, documents, images, and forms that standard integrations can't handle. The Kult Kefir case study is a direct example.

finalCta.headline: Have a business process that's costing you time?
finalCta.body: Send us a short description of the process and we'll tell you whether it's a good candidate for automation.

footer.privacyNote: We don't collect personal data on this site.
